summary: Excellent PowerShell architecture with modular design (thin entry script, injected-dependency module, comprehensive test harness). Strong error handling, type annotations, strict mode throughout. Minor issue: actions/checkout@v4 pinned to major version, not full commit SHA (supply-chain best-practice). Test harness (Run-ActTests.ps1) is exemplary—clear sections, proper cleanup, good fixture design. Potential minor enhancement: ManifestFileName property check (line ~370) could use more idiomatic syntax, but acceptable. Highly maintainable, testable, and production-ready.
